documentation.text:
@title Freelance Escrow Contract
 @notice Holds funds between client and freelancer with dispute resolution
@notice Client deposits ETH to fund the escrow
@notice Client approves work and releases funds to freelancer
@notice Arbitrator resolves dispute — true = pay freelancer, false = refund client

deposit().notice: Client deposits ETH to fund the escrow

releaseFunds().notice: Client approves work and releases funds to freelancer

resolveDispute(bool).notice: Arbitrator resolves dispute — true = pay freelancer, false = refund client

userdoc.notice: Holds funds between client and freelancer with dispute resolution
